response.original_title: King Gizzard & The Lizard Wizard - Full Performance (Live on KEXP) | June 6, 2018
response.overview: http://KEXP.ORG presents King Gizzard & The Lizard Wizard performing live in the KEXP studio. Recorded June 6, 2018.  Songs:  Crumbling Castle  The Fourth Colour  Deserted Dunes Welcome Weary Feet  The Castle in the Air  Muddy Water  The Wheel  Host: Cheryl Waters  Audio Engineers: Samuel Joseph & Kevin Suggs  Audio Mixer: Stu Mackenzie  Cameras: Jim Beckmann, Alaia D'Alessandro, Scott Holpainen & Justin Wilmore  Editor: Scott Holpainen
response.title: King Gizzard & The Lizard Wizard - Full Performance (Live on KEXP) | June 6, 2018
